'''Figg & Associates''' was a privately held businesses conglomerate formed by [[Ecclessis Figg/Legends|Ecclessis Figg]]. It was a cousin company to Figg's original corporate venture, the [[Outer Javin Company]].

Figg & Associates was headquartered on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], and wielded tremendous influence on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="EGWT" />
